title: Terrariaswords
description: DerRedGuardians interpretation of the main swords from terraria
body:
# Teraria Swords

It contains a working Zenith and all magic Swords for crafting and a unique health and armorsystem. You can find the Sword in the Stone, randomly in the World.
You can catch cats in a bottle.
Specialy we added the Aether dimension.
Have fun with this mod.

![.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7fccc425db7a862648e6b4a05ab45429298e2911.png)

Made by DerRedGuardian in association with Kayaba 92
